allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Production hardening: Phases 1-4 complete

Phase 1 - Fix What''s Broken:
- Fix DB connection pool \(max open/idle conns, lifetime\)
- Add HTTP server timeouts \(read/write/idle\)
- Add rate limiting middleware
- Secure JWT auth middleware \(proper claims validation\)
- Fix DTO types for API consistency
- Add healthcheck endpoints

Phase 2 - Production Hardening:
- Parameterize all env vars in docker-compose \(no hardcoded secrets\)
- Add .env.example with required variables
- Add healthchecks to all Docker services
- Add .dockerignore for Go backend

Phase 3 - Science Quality & Frontend Cleanup:
- Replace print\(\) with structured logging in BioAPI
- Seed RNG for reproducible binding site detection \(np.random.default_rng\)
- Fix broken secondary structure fallback to parse PDB HELIX/SHEET records
- Standardize quality metrics to null instead of "unknown" strings
- Remove unused Python deps \(rdkit, aiofiles\)
- Fix CORS whitespace handling
- Remove 100+ console.log statements from frontend
- Add React ErrorBoundary for crash recovery
- Fix Go error handling \(cascading DELETEs, type assertions, RowsAffected\)
- Add parseIDParam helper for input validation

Phase 4 - Cleanup, Security & Deployment:
- Strip 369 remaining console.log statements from 49 API routes
- Remove 7 unused npm deps \(ngl, three, web3, papaparse, cuid, web3-react\)
- Remove jQuery CDN script from layout
- Delete insecure file-based auth routes \(login, register, reset\)
- Fix frontend Dockerfile with proper multi-stage Next.js standalone build
- Replace hardcoded secrets in deployment compose with env vars
- Fix Go Dockerfile port \(8080 -> 8082\)
- Define role/status constants, replace all hardcoded strings
- Replace projects page mock data with Coming Soon placeholder
- Remove bioapi unnecessary db dependency

110 files changed, ~3000 insertions, ~8000 deletions \(net cleanup\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
